ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seminars" (
  "seminar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seminar */,
  "seminar_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number assigned to the seminar */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the seminar */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic or title of the seminar */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department conducting the seminar */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the seminar is held */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the seminar */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the seminar */,
  "objectives" TEXT /* Learning objectives of the seminar */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the seminar record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the seminar record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seminar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seminars_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seminars_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seminars_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES event_venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guest_speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest speaker */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the guest speaker */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the guest speaker */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the guest speaker */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the guest speaker */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the guest speaker */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the guest speaker */,
  "previous_engagements" TEXT /* Previous speaking engagements of the guest speaker */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the speaker record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the speaker record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seminar_speakers" (
  "seminar_speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seminar-speaker relationship */,
  "seminar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seminar */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest speaker */,
  "order_of_presentation" INTEGER /* Order in which the speaker is presenting (if multiple speakers) */,
  "session_title" TEXT /* Title of the speaker's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seminar_speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seminar_speakers_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES guest_speakers ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seminar_speakers_seminar_id FOREIGN KEY ("seminar_id") REFERENCES seminars ("seminar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "seminar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seminar */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who attended */,
  "attended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user attended the seminar */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the user after attending the seminar */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_seminar_id FOREIGN KEY ("seminar_id") REFERENCES seminars ("seminar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, staff, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* User's specialization (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seminar_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "seminar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seminar the material belongs to */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., presentation, handout, recording) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the material */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the material in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the material was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seminar_materials_seminar_id FOREIGN KEY ("seminar_id") REFERENCES seminars ("seminar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seminar_materials_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seminar_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "seminar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seminar */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by attendees */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses received */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the feedback */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for future improvements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seminar_feedback_seminar_id FOREIGN KEY ("seminar_id") REFERENCES seminars ("seminar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the venue */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* Facilities available at the venue (e.g., parking, catering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seminar_venues" (
  "seminar_venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seminar-venue relationship */,
  "seminar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seminar */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seminar_venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seminar_venues_seminar_id FOREIGN KEY ("seminar_id") REFERENCES seminars ("seminar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seminar_venues_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES event_venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_registration" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who registered */,
  "seminar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seminar */,
  "registered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registration_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registration_seminar_id FOREIGN KEY ("seminar_id") REFERENCES seminars ("seminar_id")
)
